---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour
title: 'bug: '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Set env vars: `MYSQL_HOST=...`, `PGSQL_HOST=...`
2. Run `pgpipe ...`
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots.

## Environment

- pgpipe version: (run `pgpipe --help` for version)
- OS: (e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Go version: (if building from source)
- MySQL version:
- PostgreSQL version:

## Additional context

Any other context (config files with credentials redacted, stack traces, etc.).
